narrative:
Barlow Twp township has 1,966 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.2 percentage points.
